items.title: Gesture-Controlled Performance System
items.category: GESTURE INTERFACES • LIVE A/V • EMBODIED SYSTEMS
items.description: A modular gesture-driven audiovisual system where the body becomes the instrument—generating sound, visuals, and presence in real time.
items.fullDescription: MediaPipe and TouchDesigner map body movement to real-time sound and generative visuals. First shown at Fever Dream; since then it has served as a modular live A/V platform—gestures drive glitch and drone textures, pulses, and projections—with an intentionally slow, embodied approach to control and coding.
items.medium: Gesture interfaces, real-time sound/visual generation, sensor-based interaction, ambient performance systems
items.technical: MediaPipe, TouchDesigner, Python, real-time audio synthesis, custom control pipelines
items.themes: Embodied computation, glitch aesthetics, subconscious interaction, ambient sound design, poetic control systems

items.title: Spaces @ OOST
items.description: Ambient music and poetry event at the Ambient Room at Oost, Groningen.
items.fullDescription: One night at Ambient Room, Oost: live ambient sets, poetry, and VJ work in the same room—sound, text, and image kept deliberately slow and sensory.
items.medium: Live VJing, ambient music, poetry, audiovisual installation
items.technical: Video projection, live music mixing, audiovisual sequencing
items.themes: Immersive sound, ambient textures, poetic expression, club-based audiovisual experience
